title: Alseodaphne oblanceolata

The classification of Alseodaphne oblanceolata is based on its characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other species.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities, potentially offering relief from various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections.
